---
title: "Through the Lens"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="lens-page">

  <!-- Hero -->
  <div class="lens-hero">
    <img src="photo /DSC_3890.JPG" alt="Pastel sunset over the Pacific">
    <div class="lens-hero-overlay">
      <p class="lens-hero-text">Where light meets water,<br>I find my stillness.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Intro -->
  <div class="art-divider"><div class="art-divider-diamond"></div></div>

  <div class="lens-intro">
    <p>Photography is how I pause. Between data models and strategy decks, I chase golden hours along the California coast — drawn to the fleeting moments where light, water, and life converge. These are some of those moments.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Golden Hour ── -->
  <p class="lens-collection-label">Golden Hour</p>

  <div class="lens-masonry">
    <div class="lens-item lens-item--tall" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3047.JPG" alt="Golden sunset silhouette — person walking their dog at the water's edge">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Homeward</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">A silhouette at the edge of the world — the kind of moment that makes you stop mid-step.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lens-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3039.JPG" alt="Woman with dog among golden-lit rocks at sunset">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Still Warm</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">Rocky shore, golden light, unhurried footsteps. The best company is the quiet kind.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lens-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3077.JPG" alt="Abstract golden light refracting through ocean waves">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Liquid Gold</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">Sunlight caught inside a wave — sometimes the most beautiful things last less than a second.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Ocean & Sky ── -->
  <p class="lens-collection-label">Ocean &amp; Sky</p>

  <div class="lens-masonry">
    <div class="lens-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3890.JPG" alt="Pastel pink and blue sunset over gentle ocean waves">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Cotton Candy Skies</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">That ten-minute window when the sky turns pastel and the ocean holds its breath.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lens-item lens-item--tall" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3107.JPG" alt="Waves rolling in at dusk with a flock of birds gathered on the sand">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Evening Assembly</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">Hundreds of birds lined up at the waterline, as if waiting for the last light to say goodnight.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lens-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3475.JPG" alt="Huntington Beach pier at dusk with beachgoers in the foreground">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">The Pier</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">Huntington Beach at dusk — where surfers, seagulls, and strangers share the same golden hour.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Wings & Waves ── -->
  <p class="lens-collection-label">Wings &amp; Waves</p>

  <div class="lens-masonry">
    <div class="lens-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3471.JPG" alt="Seagull spreading its wings with another looking on">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Wingspan</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">Caught mid-stretch — a small moment of wild grace at arm's length.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lens-item lens-item--tall" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_2949.JPG" alt="Person wading in surf alongside sandpipers near rocky coast">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Shared Shore</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">We're all just visitors here — sandpipers, humans, and the tide.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lens-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="photo /DSC_3623.JPG" alt="Two small shorebirds on a pale blue beach">
      <div class="lens-caption">
        <span class="lens-caption-title">Quiet Company</span>
        <span class="lens-caption-text">Two little ones, knee-deep in morning light. The beach belongs to the early birds.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Closing -->
  <div class="art-divider"><div class="art-divider-diamond"></div></div>

  <div class="lens-closing">
    <p>Every photograph is a small act of noticing — a reminder that beauty doesn't wait for us to be ready.</p>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- Lightbox -->
<div class="lens-lightbox" id="lensLightbox" onclick="closeLightbox(event)">
  <button class="lens-lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox(event)">&times;</button>
  <div class="lens-lightbox-content">
    <img id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="">
    <div class="lens-lightbox-caption">
      <span class="lens-lightbox-title" id="lightboxTitle"></span>
      <span class="lens-lightbox-text" id="lightboxText"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="lens-lightbox-prev" onclick="navigateLightbox(event, -1)">&#8249;</button>
  <button class="lens-lightbox-next" onclick="navigateLightbox(event, 1)">&#8250;</button>
</div>

<script>
  const allItems = document.querySelectorAll('.lens-item');
  let currentIndex = 0;

  function openLightbox(el) {
    currentIndex = Array.from(allItems).indexOf(el);
    showImage(currentIndex);
    document.getElementById('lensLightbox').classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }

  function closeLightbox(e) {
    if (e.target.classList.contains('lens-lightbox') || e.target.classList.contains('lens-lightbox-close')) {
      document.getElementById('lensLightbox').classList.remove('active');
      document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
  }

  function navigateLightbox(e, dir) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    currentIndex = (currentIndex + dir + allItems.length) % allItems.length;
    showImage(currentIndex);
  }

  function showImage(idx) {
    const item = allItems[idx];
    document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src = item.querySelector('img').src;
    document.getElementById('lightboxImg').alt = item.querySelector('img').alt;
    document.getElementById('lightboxTitle').textContent = item.querySelector('.lens-caption-title').textContent;
    document.getElementById('lightboxText').textContent = item.querySelector('.lens-caption-text').textContent;
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    const lb = document.getElementById('lensLightbox');
    if (!lb.classList.contains('active')) return;
    if (e.key === 'Escape') { lb.classList.remove('active'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; }
    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') { currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % allItems.length; showImage(currentIndex); }
    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') { currentIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + allItems.length) % allItems.length; showImage(currentIndex); }
  });
</script>
```
